title: Dishwashers
description: Clean dishes, kitchen, food preparation equipment, or utensils.

tasks.text: Wash dishes, glassware, flatware, pots, or pans, using dishwashers or by hand.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain kitchen work areas, equipment, or utensils in clean and orderly condition.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Place clean dishes, utensils, or cooking equipment in storage areas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Stock supplies, such as food or utensils, in serving stations, cupboards, refrigerators, or salad bars.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean or prepare various foods for cooking or serving.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sort and remove trash, placing it in designated pickup areas.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Transfer supplies or equipment between storage and work areas, by hand or using hand trucks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean garbage cans with water or steam.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Load or unload trucks that deliver or pick up food or supplies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare and package individual place settings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
